summary: Frontend-only testing of Lucky Jack app completed. All 7 requested features verified and working correctly: Sound toggle, Personalize section, Quick Select buttons, Clear button, Prediction History, Get New Numbers button, and 2.50 CHF price display.
passed_tests: Sound toggle button (🔊) visible in header next to lottery mode toggles
Sound toggle toggles between 🔊 (ON) and 🔇 (OFF) when clicked
Personalize Your Numbers section expands when clicked
Quick Select buttons (Patrick, Samantha, Jack) all visible and functional
Clicking Patrick fills name='Patrick Pulfer' and birthday='16/06/1977'
Clear button appears when name/birthday is filled
Clear button clears both fields and hides itself when clicked
Prediction History section shows saved predictions (21 predictions saved)
Get New Numbers button generates predictions with ball animation
Price shows 2.50 CHF per ticket in Multiple Tickets section
Total price calculation works (e.g., 1 ticket = 2.50 CHF, 3 tickets = 7.5 CHF)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Sound toggle (🔊/🔇) in header with data-testid='sound-toggle', 2) Personalize section expands with Quick Select buttons (Patrick, Samantha, Jack) with data-testid='quick-name-0/1/2', 3) Clear button (data-testid='clear-personalize-btn') appears when fields filled and clears both name/birthday, 4) Prediction History section shows saved predictions with count, 5) Get New Numbers button (data-testid='generate-btn') triggers ball machine animation, 6) Multiple Tickets section shows 2.50 CHF per ticket price.
